title: Breach of the Consent and Purpose Limitation Obligations by Koh Wei Ming @ Muhammad Amin Koh (trading as Mobile Chat)
summary: A financial penalty of $48,000 was imposed on Koh Wei Ming @ Muhammad Amin Koh (trading as Mobile Chat) for using his customers’ personal data to register for additional prepaid SIM cards without their consent. The additional SIM cards were then sold to anonymous and unauthorised purchasers who subsequently used them to send specifi...
